children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: In addition to the amounts authorized by , there are authorized to be appropriated to the Administrator to carry out this chapter $45,000,000 for each of fiscal years 2023 through 2028.section 892d of this title

children.heading: Joint ocean and coastal mapping centers
children.label: b Joint ocean and coastal mapping centers
children.text: Of the amounts appropriated pursuant to subsection (a), the following amounts shall be used to carry out section 3504(c) of this title $15,000,000 for each of fiscal years 2023 through 2028.1See References in Text note below.1

children.heading: Ocean and coastal mapping Federal funding opportunity
children.label: c Ocean and coastal mapping Federal funding opportunity
children.text: Of amounts authorized pursuant to subsection (a), $20,000,000 is authorized to carry out .section 3504a of this title
